steps.title: Read the graph values for years in the answer choices
steps.content: From the line graph, extract the y-values (number of 3-D movies): 2003 ≈ 1, 2004 ≈ 3, 2008 ≈ 9, 2009 ≈ 20, 2010 ≈ 27, 2011 ≈ 46.

steps.title: Calculate year-to-year changes and identify the greatest
steps.content:
For each consecutive year pair in the answer choices, find the difference:
  • 2003–2004: $3 - 1 = 2$
  • 2008–2009: $20 - 9 = 11$
  • 2009–2010: $27 - 20 = 7$
  • 2010–2011: $46 - 27 = 19$
The greatest change is 19 movies. That matches choice D — D is correct.
